description: METRO by Mosaic Homes — a boutique rowhome collection in the heart of Metrotown offering the best & most unique floorplan in the complex. This meticulously maintained corner/end 3 Bed home shows like a designer showcase, featuring an open-concept main level w/ a chef-inspired kitchen, oversized island, upgraded appliances & quartz countertops, + generous living/dining space that flows to your private South-facing patio w/ premium landscaping & low-maintenance artificial turf. Upstairs, enjoy 3 spacious bedrooms, 2 full baths, highlighted by a serene primary retreat w/ custom cabinetry. This home is directly connected to 2 secure parking stalls w/ an additional flex/storage room for ultimate convenience. School catchment: Maywood School & Burnaby South Secondary.
